description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a prominent gable roof and a full-length covered porch running along the front facade. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, with a series of evenly spaced rectangular windows on both levels. The front porch is supported by simple posts and enclosed with a railing, providing a sheltered outdoor space. The main entryway is centrally located on the porch, flanked by windows and accessible via a small set of steps. The roof is steeply pitched, and the overall design is symmetrical and functional, reminiscent of traditional American farmhouse or ranch styles. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements.
description: A two-story rectangular house with a gable roof, full-length covered front porch, and symmetrical window arrangement. The design is simple and functional, with light-colored walls and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, smooth wall with a row of upper windows and the covered porch extending the length of the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gable roof, symmetrical window placement, central entryway, and full-length covered porch with railing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, but with the porch and entryway more visible, as well as the regular window arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain wall with fewer windows and a secondary door, lacking the porch and decorative elements of the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door on a full-length covered porch with railing and supporting posts, accessible by steps, simple and functional.
